prompt: Create a warm, candid, photorealistic vertical 35mm-style indoor snapshot of a cozy, slightly messy apartment living room at night. The main subject is a young East Asian woman with black messy hair and round glasses lying upside down across a dark gray fabric sofa, head near the front-right edge of the couch, one arm bent behind her head and the other relaxed outward, eyes closed or half-closed with a tired, peaceful expression. She wears a muted blue sleeveless tank top and light gray drawstring lounge shorts, bare legs stretched along the sofa, with a rumpled beige throw blanket around her waist and cushions nearby. The room should feel lived-in and intimate: stacks of magazines and papers on a chair and side surfaces, shelves full of books and records in the background, a low wooden coffee table on the right holding exactly three black remote controls and one ceramic mug, and a pile of blankets on an ottoman or floor cushion in the back. Include exactly three warm light sources: a large floor lamp on the left foreground, a small lamp on a cabinet in the rear center, and another glowing lamp near the right rear curtains. Use warm tungsten evening light, shallow depth of field, soft film grain, natural skin tones, slight motion softness, realistic clutter, and an unposed documentary-photo composition shot from above the sofa looking diagonally through the room. Avoid glamour styling; make it feel like an ordinary quiet night at home.
